final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original UI design system showcase illustration featuring a web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls.

Style/medium: needs a classic minimalist tech aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include multi-layer layout showing web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls arranged with clear visual hierarchy
Subject: must include all UI components:
  - Web Dashboard panel
  - Mobile interface screen
  - Card components
  - Button components
  - Control widgets (toggles, sliders, inputs, etc.)
Scene/backdrop: needs a deep tech-environment backdrop — exact background treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a high-tech, visually striking atmosphere with strong depth and layering — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a cool-toned tech direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek, glass-morphism or dark-surface treatment — exact sheen and depth are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve all listed UI component types; must convey strong visual hierarchy and tech sophistication
Avoid: flat or dull layouts; overly colorful non-tech palettes
